results.rendered_html: tathya (von tathā) adj. f. ā wahr, n. Wahres, Wahrheit  AK. 1,1,5,22 . 3,4,24,156 .  H. 264 . tathyairvacobhiḥ  MBH. 7,2136 . guṇāṃstathyān 7044 . 14,2847 . niścayaṃ paramaṃ tathyam 3,2213 .  R. 2,34,23 . ˚vacana  PAÑCAT. 5,1 . priyamapi tathyamāha śakuntalāṃ  ŚĀK. 10,18 . satyaṃ janā vacmi na pakṣapātāllokeṣu sarveṣu ca tathyametat  BHARTṚ. 1,54 . ˚vādin  BHĀG. P. 8,11,11 . tathyenāpi bruvan der Wahrheit gemäss  M. 8,274 . tathyatas dass.  RĀJA-TAR. 1,325 .

tathya a. [tathā sādhu yat] True, real, genuine; priyamapi tathyamāha priyaṃvadā  Ś. 1. 
— thyaṃ Truth, reality; sā tathyamevābhihitā bhavena  Ku. 3. 63 ;  Ms. 8. 274.
